title: Prevent public Pages route regressions
risk: A new static page works locally but is not copied into _site, linked from the homepage, or compatible with the GitHub Pages subpath.
prompt: Add a new public research module to the BTC macro Pages site.
deterministic_checks: internal links resolve under the btc-macro-system base path
workflow runs the harness validator after Pages artifact preparation
done_criteria: The new module is reachable from the homepage.
No root-absolute local links are introduced.
The deployment workflow has a deterministic guard for the new surface.
judge_questions: Would GitHub Pages publish the new file?
Would a future homepage link typo be caught?
Did the agent update source files rather than only _site?
